dict.string: PAI controls Messages, Mail, Calendar, and System Events so it can send messages and create events on your behalf.
PAI reads and writes calendar events so it can answer questions about your schedule and add events you ask it to.
PAI reads your contacts so it can recognise people you mention by name and address messages on your behalf.
PAI reads files from your Desktop when you ask it to work with them.
PAI reads files from your Documents folder when you ask it to work with them.
PAI reads files from your Downloads folder when you ask it to work with them.
PAI uses your location so it can answer questions that depend on where you are (weather, nearby places, travel time).
PAI listens to the microphone when you start a voice conversation with it.
PAI reads and writes reminders so it can manage tasks you ask it to track.
PAI runs system-administration scripts on your behalf when you ask it to change system settings.
PAI posts a notification when one of your PAIs finishes a turn.
